curation_notes: Patch modifies only html/parse.go (1 non-test source file). Two functions were changed: inFramesetIM had a special case dispatching <template> to inTemplateIM which caused a nil pointer panic, and inBodyIM had a special case incorrectly adding <frame> elements when a <template> was in the open elements stack. The fix removes both special cases, adding <frame> to the ignore list in inBodyIM and removing the <template> dispatch in inFramesetIM. Vulnerability class null-deref confirmed from CWE-476 and the advisory description mentioning 'panic: runtime error'. No sibling files share the same vulnerability pattern.
